commit.message:
[FLINK-20850][runtime] Removing usage of CoLocationConstraints

See also FLINK-20589

This closes #14584

[FLINK-20850][runtime] Removing usage of CoLocationConstraints

See also FLINK-20589

This closes #14584

[FLINK-20861][json] Introduce an option for serializing DECIMALs in JSON as plain number instead of scientific notation

This closes #14604

verification.payload:
tree 71a18051a01140d55b26b19a8a6391ae10c12275
parent ac968b83675e64712b4d35dbc166e09808c2156b
author LM Kang <mirai.senshi@outlook.com> 1610540149 +0800
committer GitHub <noreply@github.com> 1610540149 +0800

[FLINK-20861][json] Introduce an option for serializing DECIMALs in JSON as plain number instead of scientific notation

This closes #14604

files.patch:
@@ -280,6 +280,13 @@ Format Options String Specify string literal to replace null key when 'canal-json.map-null-key.mode' is LITERAL. + +
canal-json.encode.decimal-as-plain-number
+ optional + false + Boolean + Encode all decimals as plain numbers instead of possible scientific notations. By default, decimals may be written using scientific notation. For example, 0.000000027 is encoded as 2.7E-8 by default, and will be written as 0.000000027 if set this option to true. +
canal-json.database.include
optional

@@ -278,6 +278,13 @@ Format 参数 String 当 'canal-json.map-null-key.mode' 是 LITERAL 的时候，指定字符串常量替换 Map 中的空 key 值。 + +
canal-json.encode.decimal-as-plain-number
+ 选填 + false + Boolean + 将所有 DECIMAL 类型的数据保持原状，不使用科学计数法表示。例：0.000000027 默认会表示为 2.7E-8。当此选项设为 true 时，则会表示为 0.000000027。 +
canal-json.database.include
optional

@@ -361,7 +361,14 @@ Use format `debezium-avro-confluent` to interpret Debezium Avro messages and for 'null' String Specify string literal to replace null key when 'debezium-json.map-null-key.mode' is LITERAL. - + + +
debezium-json.encode.decimal-as-plain-number
+ optional + false + Boolean + Encode all decimals as plain numbers instead of possible scientific notations. By default, decimals may be written using scientific notation. For example, 0.000000027 is encoded as 2.7E-8 by default, and will be written as 0.000000027 if set this option to true. +

@@ -360,6 +360,13 @@ Flink 提供了 `debezium-avro-confluent` 和 `debezium-json` 两种 format 来 String 当 'debezium-json.map-null-key.mode' 是 LITERAL 的时候，指定字符串常量替换 Map 中的空 key 值。 + +
debezium-json.encode.decimal-as-plain-number
+ 选填 + false + Boolean + 将所有 DECIMAL 类型的数据保持原状，不使用科学计数法表示。例：0.000000027 默认会表示为 2.7E-8。当此选项设为 true 时，则会表示为 0.000000027。 +

@@ -136,6 +136,13 @@ Format Options String Specify string literal to replace null key when 'json.map-null-key.mode' is LITERAL. + +
json.encode.decimal-as-plain-number
+ optional + false + Boolean + Encode all decimals as plain numbers instead of possible scientific notations. By default, decimals may be written using scientific notation. For example, 0.000000027 is encoded as 2.7E-8 by default, and will be written as 0.000000027 if set this option to true. +

@@ -135,6 +135,13 @@ Format 参数 String 当 'json.map-null-key.mode' 是 LITERAL 的时候，指定字符串常量替换 Map 中的空 key 值。 + +
json.encode.decimal-as-plain-number
+ 选填 + false + Boolean + 将所有 DECIMAL 类型的数据保持原状，不使用科学计数法表示。例：0.000000027 默认会表示为 2.7E-8。当此选项设为 true 时，则会表示为 0.000000027。 +

maxwell-json.encode.decimal-as-plain-number
+ optional + false + Boolean + Encode all decimals as plain numbers instead of possible scientific notations. By default, decimals may be written using scientific notation. For example, 0.000000027 is encoded as 2.7E-8 by default, and will be written as 0.000000027 if set this option to true. +

+ 选填 + false + Boolean + 将所有 DECIMAL 类型的数据保持原状，不使用科学计数法表示。例：0.000000027 默认会表示为 2.7E-8。当此选项设为 true 时，则会表示为 0.000000027。 +
